news.summary: The EPS 2026 has replaced EPS 1995, introducing a new pension framework under the Code on Social Security, 2020. The new scheme retains key pension benefits and contribution rates while adding digital compliance, a 20-day claim settlement timeline and interest on delayed claims.&nbsp;

news.title: Multibagger small-cap stock hits 5% upper circuit for second day after Vijay Kedia raises stake

news.title: Why Gen Z borrows for experiences and keeps investments intact
